# Boheme Aesthetics
> Holistic facial spa and skincare boutique in Palm Desert, CA. Luxury, science-based skincare blending ancient Eastern wisdom with modern techniques.

Boheme Aesthetics is a boutique holistic facial spa located on El Paseo in Palm Desert, California, in the Coachella Valley. Founded and operated by licensed aesthetician Francheska Rosbarsky (Franki), the studio specializes in high-vibrational, curated facials and personalized skincare experiences. Voted Best Esthetician 2024 and Top 3 Spas in The Desert 2023.

Core philosophy: honor each client's unique beauty by reconnecting mind, body, and soul through holistic skincare — blending ancient wisdom with modern techniques.

## Services

- [All Services](https://bohemeaesthetics.com/services)
- Bohème Beauty — 120-min signature facial, $375
- SFL Buccal Facial (Yakov Gershkovich method) — 90 min, $275
- Bohème Collagen Activation Facial (Osmosis Infusion + LED) — 80 min, $235

## Treatments & Modalities

TCM Gua Sha · Sculptural Buccal Facial Massage · Facial Reflexology · Manual Lymphatic Drainage · LED Light Therapy · Nano-Needling · Osmosis Facial Infusion · Microcurrent Therapy · Thai Herbal Compress

## Credentials

- Licensed Skincare Specialist — 1000 Hours Advanced Aesthetics
- Sculptural Face Lifting & Buccal Intra-Oral Facial Massage — trained under Yakov Gershkovich
- Nefeli Gua Sha — trained under TCM Doctor Ping Zhang
- Thai Herbal Compress — trained under Beth Russell, LAc
- Microcurrent Therapy Certified
- Advanced Facial Fascia Anatomy

## Boutique

Curated skincare products: Epicutis, Osmosis MD, Laurel Skin, Josh Rosebrook, Kypris, SIV, ROOTS Candle Collection.
[Shop the Boutique](https://bohemeaesthetics.com/shop)
